message: ci: fix windows env + align pnpm

files.patch:
@@ -22,7 +22,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Install pnpm
         uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
         with:
-          version: 9
+          version: 10.26.2
 
       - name: Use Node.js ${{ matrix.node-version }}
         uses: actions/setup-node@v4
@@ -56,7 +56,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Install pnpm
         uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
         with:
-          version: 9
+          version: 10.26.2
 
       - name: Use Node.js 20.x
         uses: actions/setup-node@v4

@@ -17,7 +17,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Install pnpm
         uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
         with:
-          version: 9
+          version: 10.26.2
 
       - name: Use Node.js 20.x
         uses: actions/setup-node@v4

@@ -3,6 +3,7 @@
   "version": "0.1.0",
   "private": true,
   "description": "Privacy-focused analytics dashboard for Sparkle-enabled macOS applications",
+  "packageManager": "pnpm@10.26.2",
   "scripts": {
     "build": "next build",
     "dev": "next dev",
@@ -11,10 +12,10 @@
     "lint": "biome check . && oxlint -c .oxlintrc.json -A all -W correctness -W suspicious -A react/react-in-jsx-scope -A react/jsx-uses-react -A unicorn/consistent-function-scoping -A eslint/no-await-in-loop -A import/no-unassigned-import -A import/no-named-as-default -A jest/no-disabled-tests -A jest/no-conditional-expect -A jest/expect-expect -A nextjs/no-html-link-for-pages -A typescript/no-base-to-string -A typescript/unbound-method -A typescript/no-unnecessary-type-assertion -A typescript/no-unsafe-enum-comparison -A typescript/no-unsafe-type-assertion --deny-warnings --import-plugin --react-plugin --nextjs-plugin --vitest-plugin --type-aware --tsconfig tsconfig.oxlint.json app components hooks lib tests",
     "lint:fix": "biome check --write . && oxlint -c .oxlintrc.json -A all -W correctness -W suspicious -A react/react-in-jsx-scope -A react/jsx-uses-react -A unicorn/consistent-function-scoping -A eslint/no-await-in-loop -A import/no-unassigned-import -A import/no-named-as-default -A jest/no-disabled-tests -A jest/no-conditional-expect -A jest/expect-expect -A nextjs/no-html-link-for-pages -A typescript/no-base-to-string -A typescript/unbound-method -A typescript/no-unnecessary-type-assertion -A typescript/no-unsafe-enum-comparison -A typescript/no-unsafe-type-assertion --deny-warnings --import-plugin --react-plugin --nextjs-plugin --vitest-plugin --type-aware --tsconfig tsconfig.oxlint.json --fix app components hooks lib tests",
     "start": "next start",
-    "test": "NODE_NO_WARNINGS=1 vitest run",
-    "test:api": "NODE_NO_WARNINGS=1 vitest run --dir tests/api",
-    "test:components": "NODE_NO_WARNINGS=1 vitest run --dir tests/components",
-    "test:coverage": "NODE_NO_WARNINGS=1 vitest run --coverage",
+    "test": "cross-env NODE_NO_WARNINGS=1 vitest run",
+    "test:api": "cross-env NODE_NO_WARNINGS=1 vitest run --dir tests/api",
+    "test:components": "cross-env NODE_NO_WARNINGS=1 vitest run --dir tests/components",
+    "test:coverage": "cross-env NODE_NO_WARNINGS=1 vitest run --coverage",
     "test:ui": "vitest --ui",
     "test:watch": "vitest",
     "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit"
@@ -78,17 +79,18 @@
   "devDependencies": {
     "@biomejs/biome": "^2.3.10",
     "@tailwindcss/postcss": "^4.1.18",
-    "@testing-library/jest-dom": "^6.9.1",
     "@testing-library/dom": "latest",
+    "@testing-library/jest-dom": "^6.9.1",
     "@testing-library/react": "^16.3.1",
     "@testing-library/user-event": "^14.6.1",
     "@types/debug": "latest",
     "@types/node": "^25.0.3",
     "@types/react": "^19.2.7",
     "@types/react-dom": "^19.2.3",
-    "@vitest/coverage-v8": "^4.0.16",
     "@vitest/browser": "latest",
+    "@vitest/coverage-v8": "^4.0.16",
     "@vitest/ui": "^4.0.16",
+    "cross-env": "^10.1.0",
     "happy-dom": ">=20.0.2",
